page.title: Device Presets
page.desc: Manage device fingerprint presets available for profiles, selectable when creating profiles
page.emptyHint: Click 'Add Device Preset' in the top right to create your first one
page.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete '{{name}}'? Profiles using this preset will lose their device configuration. This action cannot be undone.
page.syncDesc: This preset is used by {{count}} profile(s). Sync these changes to them?
page.syncOption: Sync to {{count}} profile(s) (only preset-derived fields; fingerprint seed, language, and timezone are preserved)
page.syncedToast: Preset updated and synced to {{count}} profile(s)

form.name: Device Name
form.browserVersionHint: Sets UA / Sec-CH-UA headers — independent from the installed Chromium binary
form.uaPreviewHint: Final User-Agent header. Sec-CH-UA-Full-Version still carries the full four-part version.
form.cardDesc: Maintain device preset parameters shared across profile creation, profile list display, and launch workflows.
